description: Make a style statement effortlessly with this simply silhouetted leather handbag from hidekraft. With short handles, legs at the base and crocodile print, this bag makes for a fab combination of style and practicality. Height: 9& rdquo Length: 12.5& rdquo Width: 3& rdquo Made from 100% genuine nappa leather Has two roomy zippered compartments, one with organiser sleeves to hold a mobile and the other with a zippered pouch Two short handles with stud detailing and crocodile pattern Brand name embossed on the side Warranty: 6 Months Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
